layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Control Room Grid Protocol. High density, functional layout suitable for high-speed operational tasks like POS billing and inventory management.
layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Tailwind standard (p-2, p-4, p-6, p-8). Generous inner padding inside structured containers (p-6) to maintain legibility despite high data density.
layout_and_spacing.surfaces: Grid Borders and Flat Structural Look. Max border-radius 6px (rounded-md). 1px solid borders on all cards to maintain the 'Swiss / Technical' aesthetic. No soft shadows. Rely on crisp lines.

components.buttons: Square or rounded-md. High contrast. Primary buttons are solid black. Secondary buttons are outline (border-zinc-200) with hover:bg-zinc-100.
components.cards: Cardless or flat-card approach. bg-white, border border-zinc-200, rounded-md. No box-shadow. On hover, translate-y-[-2px] and shadow-sm for interactive cards.
components.tables: Dense. py-3 px-4 cells. 1px bottom border on rows. Table headers must be uppercase, text-xs tracking-wider font-semibold.
components.inputs: Flat, rounded-md, border-zinc-200. Focus state must use ring-2 ring-black/20 focus:border-black for high visibility.
components.navigation: Left sidebar (sticky) for modules with dark or high-contrast active states. Top bar (sticky) for global search, user profile, and quick actions (e.g., 'New POS Session').

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp and immediate. Text color must explicitly change on hover for visibility.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons, table rows, and links.
motion_and_interactions.alerts: Low stock alerts must pulse softly using Tailwind animate-pulse on the alert icon, not the whole card.

icons_and_assets.strategy: Functional, stroke-width 2. Consistent sizing (w-4 h-4 for inline, w-6 h-6 for navigation).

login_background.description: Abstract minimalist composition of supermarket retail elements. Use as a split-screen background for the Auth/Login page.

cashier_avatar.description: Professional headshot of a friendly cashier. Use for the user profile dropdown, Employee Management tables, or sample user data.

media.placeholders: For product inventory items in the POS screen, use colored placeholder divs (e.g., bg-zinc-100) with a centered lucide-react icon (like Apple, Carrot, Milk, or Package) if image URLs are not available. Do not use external dummy image services.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Use black (#000000) for primary text on light gray/white backgrounds.
accessibility.testing_attributes: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) using kebab-case role-based names.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the Light theme / Archetype 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast). Avoid gradients and soft UI shadows.
Install and use Chivo and IBM Plex Sans from Google Fonts.
In the POS UI, ensure the product grid is large and touch-friendly (min 8px spacing, large tap targets) and the billing summary is a sticky right-side pane (on desktop).
Use standard Tailwind CSS combined with heavily customized Shadcn UI primitives. Overwrite Shadcn rounded-xl or heavy shadow defaults to match the rounded-md / flat border instructions.
Build role-based conditional rendering (Admin vs Cashier vs Inventory Manager) into the sidebar and dashboard widgets.
Implement data-testid tags extensively across all forms, tables, and POS actions.
